test_cases.description: Test that generate_mnemonic returns a valid BIP39 mnemonic.
test_cases.setup_description: No setup required for this test.
test_cases.input_description: No inputs needed for mnemonic generation.
test_cases.expected_output_description: A valid BIP39 mnemonic is returned.
assertions: assert isinstance(mnemonic, Mnemonic), 'Expected instance of Mnemonic.'

test_cases.description: Test derive_key with a valid mnemonic and check if it returns a key.
test_cases.setup_description: Generate a mock valid mnemonic for testing.
test_cases.input_description: A valid BIP39 mnemonic and a key type.
test_cases.expected_output_description: A derived key should be returned.
assertions: assert isinstance(key, bytes), 'Expected bytes as derived key.'

test_cases.description: Test derive_key with an invalid mnemonic to see if it raises InvalidMnemonic error.
test_cases.setup_description: Provide an invalid mnemonic for testing.
test_cases.input_description: An invalid BIP39 mnemonic and a key type.

test_cases.description: Test store_data with encryption failure handling.
test_cases.setup_description: Mock the encryption process to simulate failure.

test_cases.description: Test retrieve_data for storage error handling when data does not exist.
test_cases.setup_description: Ensure data corresponding to identifier does not exist.
test_cases.input_description: Identifier for non-stored data and a valid tier.

test_cases.description: Test that the policy of zero secrets in memory is maintained after operations.
test_cases.setup_description: Perform operations and verify memory cleanup.
test_cases.input_description: No input values, test system state after operations.
test_cases.expected_output_description: All secrets should be cleared from memory.
assertions: assert check_memory_for_secrets(), 'Secrets should not be in memory after use.'
